requirements.task_name: Request the most affordable overnight nursing plan under $180 per night starting April 15
requirements.task_description: Find overnight home nursing plans, filter and sort, then request the cheapest plan under $180/night starting April 15, 2026.

requirements.task_name: Shortlist two Spanish-speaking caregivers with 5+ years experience and 4.5+ rating within 10 miles of ZIP 94105
requirements.task_description: Search for caregivers near ZIP 94105, apply filters, and favorite the first two matching caregivers.

requirements.task_name: Book the earliest available 2-hour post-surgery visit with a nurse specialized in wound care
requirements.task_description: Schedule a one-time post-surgery wound-care visit on March 20, 2026 with the earliest available 2-hour time slot, then proceed as guest.

requirements.task_name: Choose the cheaper dementia care package that offers at least 3 visits per week and schedule a start date
requirements.task_description: Compare dementia care packages with ≥3 visits/week, select the cheaper one, and set a start date of April 1, 2026.

requirements.task_name: Complete a needs assessment and schedule a phone consultation on March 10, 2026 at 3:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Complete the online assessment with specific answers, view recommendations, and book a phone consultation for 3:00 PM on March 10, 2026.

requirements.task_name: Save and copy the link to the most popular fall-prevention article from the last 12 months
requirements.task_description: Filter to fall-prevention content from the last 12 months, sort by popularity, open the top article, save it, and copy its shareable link.

required_variables.set_condition: Every time getArticleShareLink is called for any article (including the fall-prevention article).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { articleId: article ? article.id : null, shareUrl: article ? article.share_url : '', requestedAt: new Date().toISOString() } serialized to JSON.
required_variables.reason: Track which article’s share link was most recently requested so the evaluator can verify that the user copied the link for the most popular fall-prevention article published in the last 12 months (and not some other article).

requirements.task_name: Create a custom 10-hour weekly care plan with an estimated cost under $700 and submit an estimate request
requirements.task_description: Use the cost estimator to reach a weekly total of 10 hours (or fewer if adjusted) with weekly cost ≤ $700 and submit contact details.

requirements.task_name: Reschedule an existing home visit to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM using the booking management tool
requirements.task_description: Look up an existing booking by confirmation and last name, then reschedule it to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM.
